claims.headline: Falls asleep faster
claims.notesSentence: Meta-analysis of 19 RCTs found melatonin reduced sleep-onset latency and increased total sleep time in primary sleep disorders.

claims.headline: Beats jet lag
claims.notesSentence: Cochrane review of 10 RCTs concluded melatonin is remarkably effective at preventing or reducing jet lag.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Melatonin jet lag Cochrane review on PubMed
